# Bug Report

**What happened?**
_Describe what you saw._


**What should have happened?**
_Describe what you expected instead._


**Steps to trigger it**
_How can someone see this bug?_
1. Go to ...
2. Click / do ...
3. See ...

**How bad is it?**
_Pick one: Shows wrong info / Feature broken / Looks wrong / Slow / Rare edge case_


**Screenshots or error messages**
_Paste screenshots or copy error text here. Delete this section if none._


**Anything else?**
_Related issues, when it started, workarounds, etc. Delete if nothing to add._
